REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (36 Dellbrook Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder for Jewish Family & Children's Services.

Mr. Feder stated that Mr. Berman's Client was not able to obtain a loan to purchase the property and stated the terms of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $710,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $453,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order and proof of bond).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (36 Dellbrook Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Continued To Feb-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Howard Berman for and with Sharon Cipparrone (Sole Beneficiary/Successor Trustee). Bruce Feder for Jewish Family & Children's Services (JFCS). Donna Adams from JFCS also present. Bryan Kelly, Real Estate Agent for the proposed Buyers also present.

Mr. Berman requested a 30 day continuance to allow his Client to obtain/secure financing through Citibank to purchase the home. In addition, he stated that his Client waived any liability against JFCS and Mr. Feder in the event that the present Buyer backs out or the property sells for a lower amount. Mr. Feder provided a summary of the outstanding liabilities ($300,000.00), stated that he was in contract with the Buyer, that he was bound to proceed with the sale and that the current loan commitment expires on February 26, 2010. Counsel raised issues regarding changing of title of the property, the manner in which that could be achieved and the obligations needing to be cleared before distribution of the property. The matter was continued to February 23, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see if Ms. Cipparrone has a loan commitment to cover all liabilities.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
